n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER USER ALL opt_in_database SetResetClause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleSetStmt *n = makeNode(AlterRoleSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->database = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->setstmt = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Drop a postgresql DBMS role\n *\n * XXX Ideally this would have CASCADE/RESTRICT options, but a role\n * might own objects in multiple databases, and there is presently no way to\n * implement cascading to other databases.  So we always behave as RESTRICT.\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nDropRoleStmt:\n\t\t\tDROP ROLE role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP ROLE IF_P EXISTS role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP USER role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP USER IF_P EXISTS role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP GROUP_P role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP GROUP_P IF_P EXISTS role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropRoleStmt *n = makeNode(DropRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Create a postgresql group (role without login ability)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateGroupStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE GROUP_P RoleId opt_with OptRoleList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateRoleStmt *n = makeNode(CreateRoleStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stmt_type = ROLESTMT_GROUP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->role = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Alter a postgresql group\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterGroupStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER GROUP_P RoleSpec add_drop USER role_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterRoleStmt *n = @6));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nadd_drop:\tADD_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = +1; }\n\t\t\t| DROP\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = -1; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Manipulate a schema\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateSchemaStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE SCHEMA opt_single_name AUTHORIZATION RoleSpec OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* One can omit the schema name or the authorization id. */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE SCHEMA ColId OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* ...but not both */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE SCHEMA IF_P NOT EXISTS opt_single_name AUTHORIZATION RoleSpec OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* schema name can be omitted here, too */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($9 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS cannot include schema elements\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@9)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE SCHEMA IF_P NOT EXISTS ColId OptSchemaEltList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* ...but not here */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->authrole = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($7 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS cannot include schema elements\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@7)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->schemaElts = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nOptSchemaEltList:\n\t\t\tOptSchemaEltList schema_stmt\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $2);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n *\tschema_stmt are the ones that can show up inside a CREATE SCHEMA\n *\tstatement (in addition to by themselves).\n */\nschema_stmt:\n\t\t\tCreateStmt\n\t\t\t| IndexStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateSeqStmt\n\t\t\t| CreateTrigStmt\n\t\t\t| GrantStmt\n\t\t\t| ViewStmt\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * Set PG internal variable\n *\t  SET name TO 'var_value'\n * Include SQL syntax (thomas 1997-10-22):\n *\t  SET TIME ZONE 'var_value'\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nVariableSetStmt:\n\t\t\tSET set_rest\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = $2;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_local = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET LOCAL set_rest\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = $3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_local = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET SESSION set_rest\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = $3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_local = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nset_rest:\n\t\t\tTRANSACTION transaction_mode_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_MULTI;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"TRANSACTION\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SESSION CHARACTERISTICS AS TRANSACTION transaction_mode_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_MULTI;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"SESSION CHARACTERISTICS\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| set_rest_more\n\t\t\t;\n\ngeneric_set:\n\t\t\tvar_name TO var_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| var_name '=' var_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| var_name TO DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| var_name '=' DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nset_rest_more:\t/* Generic SET syntaxes: */\n\t\t\tgeneric_set\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{$$ = $1;}\n\t\t\t| var_name FROM CURRENT_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_CURRENT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* Special syntaxes mandated by SQL standard: */\n\t\t\t| TIME ZONE zone_value\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"timezone\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($3 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1($3);\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CATALOG_P Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"current database cannot be changed\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = NULL; /*not reached*/\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SCHEMA Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"search_path\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($2, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NAMES opt_encoding\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_VALUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = \"client_encoding\";\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @2;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2 != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->args = list_make1(makeStringConst($2, @2));\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_DEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ROLE NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = list_make1(makeStringConst($3 == XMLOPTION_DOCUMENT ? \"DOCUMENT\" : \"CONTENT\", @3));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->jumble_args = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* Special syntaxes invented by PostgreSQL: */\n\t\t\t| TRANSACTION SNAPSHOT Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariableSetStmt *n = makeNode(VariableSetStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = VAR_SET_MULTI;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name }\n\t\t\t| var_name '.' ColId\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = psprintf(\"%s.%s\", $1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nvar_list:\tvar_value\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| var_list ',' var_value\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nvar_value:\topt_boolean_or_string\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeStringConst($1, @1); }\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeAConst($1, @1); }\n\t\t;\n\niso_level:\tREAD UNCOMMITTED\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"read uncommitted\"; }\n\t\t\t| READ COMMITTED\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"read committed\"; }\n\t\t\t| REPEATABLE READ\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"repeatable read\"; }\n\t\t\t| SERIALIZABLE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"serializable\"; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_boolean_or_string:\n\t\t\tTRUE_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"true\"; }\n\t\t\t| FALSE_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"false\"; }\n\t\t\t| ON\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"on\"; }\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * OFF is also accepted as a boolean value, but is handled by\n\t\t\t * the NonReservedWord rule.  The action for booleans and strings\n\t\t\t * is the same, so we don't need to distinguish them here.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t| NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* Timezone values can be:\n * - a string such as 'pst8pdt'\n * - an identifier such as \"pst8pdt\"\n * - an integer or floating point number\n * - a time interval per SQL99\n * ColId gives reduce/reduce errors against ConstInterval and LOCAL,\n * so use IDENT (meaning we reject anything that is a key word).\n */\nzone_value:\n\t\t\tSconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConst($1, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| IDENT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConst($1, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ConstInterval Sconst opt_interval\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTypeName   *t = $1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($3 != NIL)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tA_Const\t   *n = (A_Const *) linitial($3);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ((n->val.ival.ival & ~(INTERVAL_MASK(HOUR) | INTERVAL_MASK(MINUTE))) != 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"time zone interval must be HOUR or HOUR TO MINUTE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@3)));\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tt->typmods = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConstCast($2, @2, t);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ConstInterval '(' Iconst ')' Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTypeName   *t = $1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tt->typmods = list_make2(makeIntConst(INTERVAL_FULL_RANGE, -1),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmakeIntConst($3, @3));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeStringConstCast($5, @5, t);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeAConst($1, @1); }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| LOCAL\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_encoding:\n\t\t\tSconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; KEY\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t&c->deferrable,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t&c->initdeferred,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t&c->is_enforced,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t&c->noinherit,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tyyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\t\t\t\t\tATAlterConstraint *c = makeNode(ATAlterConstraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_AlterConstraint;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) c;\n\t\t\t\t\tc->conname = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_column_default:\n\t\t\tSET DEFAULT a_expr\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| DROP DEFAULT\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; */\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nreplica_identity:\n\t\t\tNOTHING\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_NOTHING;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FULL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| USING INDEX name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReplicaIdentityStmt *n = makeNode(ReplicaIdentityStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->identity_type = REPLICA_IDENTITY_INDEX;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n;\n\nreloptions:\n\t\t\t'(' reloption_list ')'\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_reloptions:\t\tWITH reloptions\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t |\t\t/* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nreloption_list:\n\t\t\treloption_elem\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| reloption_list ',' reloption_elem\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\n/* This should match def_elem and also allow qualified names */\nreloption_elem:\n\t\t\tColLabel '=' def_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel '.' ColLabel '=' def_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElemExtended($1, $3, (Node *) $5,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t DEFELEM_UNSPEC, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel '.' ColLabel\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElemExtended($1, $3, NULL, DEFELEM_UNSPEC, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_identity_column_option_list:\n\t\t\talter_identity_column_option\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| alter_identity_column_option_list alter_identity_column_option\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_identity_column_option:\n\t\t\tRESTART\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"restart\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RESTART opt_with NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"restart\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET SeqOptElem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif (strcmp($2->defname, \"as\") == 0 ||\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstrcmp($2->defname, \"restart\") == 0 ||\n\t\t\t\t\t\tstrcmp($2->defname, \"owned_by\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"sequence option \\\"%s\\\" not supported here\", $2->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $2;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET GENERATED generated_when\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"generated\", (Node *) makeInteger($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nset_statistics_value:\n\t\t\tSignedIconst\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeInteger($1); }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nset_access_method_name:\n\t\t\tColId\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nPartitionBoundSpec:\n\t\t\t/* a HASH partition */\n\t\t\tFOR VALUES WITH '(' hash_partbound ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tListCell   *lc;\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_HASH;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->modulus = n->remainder = -1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tforeach (lc, $5)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDefElem    *opt = lfirst_node(DefElem, lc);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (strcmp(opt->defname, \"modulus\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (n->modulus != -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_OBJECT),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"modulus for hash partition provided more than once\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(opt->location)));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tn->modulus = defGetInt32(opt);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp(opt->defname, \"remainder\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (n->remainder != -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_OBJECT),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"remainder for hash partition provided more than once\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(opt->location)));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tn->remainder = defGetInt32(opt);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"unrecognized hash partition bound specification \\\"%s\\\"\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\topt->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(opt->location)));\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->modulus == -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"modulus for hash partition must be specified\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@3)));\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->remainder == -1)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"remainder for hash partition must be specified\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@3)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/* a LIST partition */\n\t\t\t| FOR VALUES IN_P '(' expr_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_LIST;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_default = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->listdatums = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/* a RANGE partition */\n\t\t\t| FOR VALUES FROM '(' expr_list ')' TO '(' expr_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = PARTITION_STRATEGY_RANGE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_default = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->lowerdatums = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->upperdatums = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @3;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/* a DEFAULT partition */\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionBoundSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionBoundSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_default = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nhash_partbound_elem:\n\t\tNonReservedWord Iconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) makeInteger($2), @1);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nhash_partbound:\n\t\thash_partbound_elem\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| hash_partbound ',' hash_partbound_elem\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\tALTER TYPE\n *\n * really variants of the ALTER TABLE subcommands with different spellings\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterCompositeTypeStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER TYPE_P any_name alter_type_cmds\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTableStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* can't use qualified_name, sigh */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = makeRangeVarFromAnyName($3, @3, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cmds = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\nalter_type_cmds:\n\t\t\talter_type_cmd\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| alter_type_cmds ',' alter_type_cmd\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_type_cmd:\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> ADD ATTRIBUTE <coldef> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\tADD_P ATTRIBUTE TableFuncElement opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_AddColumn;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> DROP ATTRIBUTE IF EXISTS <attname> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| DROP ATTRIBUTE IF_P EXISTS ColId opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DropColumn;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> DROP ATTRIBUTE <attname> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| DROP ATTRIBUTE ColId opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_DropColumn;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* ALTER TYPE <name> ALTER ATTRIBUTE <attname> [SET DATA] TYPE <typename> [RESTRICT|CASCADE] */\n\t\t\t| ALTER ATTRIBUTE ColId opt_set_data TYPE_P Typename opt_collate_clause opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterTableCmd *n = makeNode(AlterTableCmd);\n\t\t\t\t\tColumnDef *def = makeNode(ColumnDef);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->subtype = AT_AlterColumnType;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->def = (Node *) def;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* We only use these fields of the ColumnDef node */\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->typeName = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->collClause = (CollateClause *) $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->raw_default = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->location = @3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tclose <portalname>\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nClosePortalStmt:\n\t\t\tCLOSE cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClosePortalStmt *n = makeNode(ClosePortalStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CLOSE ALL\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tClosePortalStmt *n = makeNode(ClosePortalStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCOPY relname [(columnList)] FROM/TO file [WITH] [(options)]\n *\t\t\t\tCOPY ( query ) TO file\t[WITH] [(options)]\n *\n *\t\t\t\twhere 'query' can be one of:\n *\t\t\t\t{ SELECT | UPDATE | INSERT | DELETE }\n *\n *\t\t\t\tand 'file' can be one of:\n *\t\t\t\t{ PROGRAM 'command' | STDIN | STDOUT | 'filename' }\n *\n *\t\t\t\tIn the preferred syntax the options are comma-separated\n *\t\t\t\tand use generic identifiers instead of keywords.  The pre-9.0\n *\t\t\t\tsyntax had a hard-wired, space-separated set of options.\n *\n *\t\t\t\tReally old syntax, from versions 7.2 and prior:\n *\t\t\t\tCOPY [ BINARY ] table FROM/TO file\n *\t\t\t\t\t[ [ USING ] DELIMITERS 'delimiter' ] ]\n *\t\t\t\t\t[ WITH NULL AS 'null string' ]\n *\t\t\t\tThis option placement is not supported with COPY (query...).\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCopyStmt:\tCOPY opt_binary qualified_name opt_column_list\n\t\t\tcopy_from opt_program copy_file_name copy_delimiter opt_with\n\t\t\tcopy_options where_clause\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCopyStmt *n = makeNode(CopyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->attlist = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_from = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_program = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->filename = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whereClause = $11;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->is_program && n->filename == NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"STDIN/STDOUT not allowed with PROGRAM\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@8)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!n->is_from && n->whereClause != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"WHERE clause not allowed with COPY TO\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@11)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* Concatenate user-supplied flags */\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options, $2);\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($8)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = lappend(n->options, $8);\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($10)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->options = list_concat(n->options, $10);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COPY '(' PreparableStmt ')' TO opt_program copy_file_name opt_with copy_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCopyStmt *n = makeNode(CopyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->query = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->attlist = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_from = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_program = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->filename = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $9;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->is_program && n->filename == NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"STDIN/STDOUT not allowed with PROGRAM\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@5)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_from:\n\t\t\tFROM\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| TO\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_program:\n\t\t\tPROGRAM\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * copy_file_name NULL indicates stdio is used. Whether stdin or stdout is\n * used depends on the direction. (It really doesn't make sense to copy from\n * stdout. We silently correct the \"typo\".)\t\t - AY 9/94\n */\ncopy_file_name:\n\t\t\tSconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| STDIN\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t\t| STDOUT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_options: copy_opt_list\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| '(' copy_generic_opt_list ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* old COPY option syntax */\ncopy_opt_list:\n\t\t\tcopy_opt_list copy_opt_item\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_opt_item:\n\t\t\tBINARY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"format\", (Node *) makeString(\"binary\"), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FREEZE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"freeze\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DELIMITER opt_as Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"delimiter\", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NULL_P opt_as Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"null\", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CSV\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"format\", (Node *) makeString(\"csv\"), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| HEADER_P\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"header\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| QUOTE opt_as Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"quote\", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ESCAPE opt_as Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"escape\", (Node *) makeString($3), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORCE QUOTE columnList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force_quote\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORCE QUOTE '*'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force_quote\", (Node *) makeNode(A_Star), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORCE NOT NULL_P columnList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force_not_null\", (Node *) $4, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORCE NOT NULL_P '*'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force_not_null\", (Node *) makeNode(A_Star), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORCE NULL_P columnList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force_null\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORCE NULL_P '*'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"force_null\", (Node *) makeNode(A_Star), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ENCODING Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"encoding\", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* The following exist for backward compatibility with very old versions */\n\nopt_binary:\n\t\t\tBINARY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"format\", (Node *) makeString(\"binary\"), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_delimiter:\n\t\t\topt_using DELIMITERS Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"delimiter\", (Node *) makeString($3), @2);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_using:\n\t\t\tUSING\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t;\n\n/* new COPY option syntax */\ncopy_generic_opt_list:\n\t\t\tcopy_generic_opt_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| copy_generic_opt_list ',' copy_generic_opt_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_generic_opt_elem:\n\t\t\tColLabel copy_generic_opt_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_generic_opt_arg:\n\t\t\topt_boolean_or_string\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }\n\t\t\t| '*'\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeNode(A_Star); }\n\t\t\t| DEFAULT                       { $$ = (Node *) makeString(\"default\"); }\n\t\t\t| '(' copy_generic_opt_arg_list ')'\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $2; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncopy_generic_opt_arg_list:\n\t\t\t  copy_generic_opt_arg_list_item\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| copy_generic_opt_arg_list ',' copy_generic_opt_arg_list_item\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* beware of emitting non-string list elements here; see commands/define.c */\ncopy_generic_opt_arg_list_item:\n\t\t\topt_boolean_or_string\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE TABLE relname\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateStmt:\tCREATE OptTemp TABLE qualified_name '(' OptTableElementList ')'\n\t\t\tOptInherit OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause OptWith\n\t\t\tOnCommitOption OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tableElts = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->inhRelations = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->partspec = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->accessMethod = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oncommit = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name '('\n\t\t\tOptTableElementList ')' OptInherit OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause\n\t\t\tOptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tableElts = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->inhRelations = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->partspec = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->accessMethod = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oncommit = $15;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $16;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp TABLE qualified_name OF any_name\n\t\t\tOptTypedTableElementList OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause\n\t\t\tOptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tableElts = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->inhRelations = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->partspec = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ofTypename = makeTypeNameFromNameList($6);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ofTypename->location = @6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->accessMethod = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oncommit = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name OF any_name\n\t\t\tOptTypedTableElementList OptPartitionSpec table_access_method_clause\n\t\t\tOptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tableElts = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->inhRelations = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oncommit = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $15;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oncommit = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS shift/reduce conflicts,\n * since TEMP is not a reserved word.  See also OptTempTableName.\n *\n * NOTE: we accept both GLOBAL and LOCAL options.  They currently do nothing,\n * but future versions might consider GLOBAL to request SQL-spec-compliant\n * temp table behavior, so warn about that.  Since we have no modules the\n * LOCAL keyword is really meaningless; furthermore, some other products\n * implement LOCAL as meaning the same as our default temp table behavior,\n * so we'll probably continue to treat LOCAL as a noise word.\n */\nOptTemp:\tTEMPORARY\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| TEMP\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| LOCAL TEMPORARY\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| LOCAL TEMP\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP; }\n\t\t\t| GLOBAL TEMPORARY\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(WARNING,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errmsg(\"GLOBAL is deprecated in temporary table creation\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = RELPERSISTENCE_TEMP;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| GLOBAL TEMP\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(WARNING,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errmsg(\"GLOBAL is deprecated in temporary table creation\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = ColConstraintElem\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| ConstraintAttr\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| COLLATE any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * Note: the CollateClause is momentarily included in\n\t\t\t\t\t * the list built by ColQualList, but we split it out\n\t\t\t\t\t * again in SplitColQualList.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tCollateClause *n = makeNode(CollateClause);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->arg = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* DEFAULT NULL is already the default for Postgres.\n * But define it here and carry it forward into the system\n * to make it explicit.\n * - thomas 1998-09-13\n *\n * WITH NULL and NULL are not SQL-standard syntax elements,\n * so leave them out. Use DEFAULT NULL to explicitly indicate\n * that a column may have that value. WITH NULL leads to\n * shift/reduce conflicts with WITH TIME ZONE anyway.\n * - thomas 1999-01-08\n *\n * DEFAULT expression must be b_expr not a_expr to prevent shift/reduce\n * conflict on NOT (since NOT might start a subsequent NOT NULL constraint,\n * or be part of a_expr NOT LIKE or similar constructs).\n */\nColConstraintElem:\n\t\t\tNOT NULL_P = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| GENERATED generated_when AS IDENTITY_P OptParenthesizedSeqOptList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| GENERATED generated_when AS '(' a_expr ')' opt_virtual_or_stored\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = @1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * Can't do this in the grammar because of shift/reduce\n\t\t\t\t\t * conflicts.  (IDENTITY allows both ALWAYS and BY\n\t\t\t\t\t * DEFAULT, but generated columns only allow ALWAYS.)  We\n\t\t\t\t\t * can also give a more useful error message and location.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($2 != ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_ALWAYS)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"for a generated column, GENERATED ALWAYS must be specified\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| REFERENCES qualified_name opt_column_list key_match key_actions\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_FOREIGN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->pktable = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_attrs = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->pk_attrs = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_matchtype = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_upd_action = ($5)->updateAction->action;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_del_action = ($5)->deleteAction->action;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_del_set_cols = ($5)->deleteAction->cols;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_enforced = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->skip_validation = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initially_valid = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_unique_null_treatment:\n\t\t\tNULLS_P DISTINCT\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| NULLS_P NOT DISTINCT\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t;\n\ngenerated_when:\n\t\t\tALWAYS\t\t\t{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_ALWAYS; }\n\t\t\t| BY DEFAULT\t{ $$ = ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_BY_DEFAULT; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * ConstraintAttr represents constraint attributes, which we parse as if\n * they were independent constraint clauses, in order to avoid shift/reduce\n * conflicts (since NOT might start either an independent NOT NULL clause\n * or an attribute).  parse_utilcmd.c is responsible for attaching the\n * attribute information to the preceding \"real\" constraint node, and for\n * complaining if attribute clauses appear in the wrong place or wrong\n * combinations.\n *\n * See also ConstraintAttributeSpec, which can be used in places where\n * there is no parsing conflict.  (Note: currently, NOT VALID and NO INHERIT\n * are allowed clauses in ConstraintAttributeSpec, but not here.  Someday we\n * might need to allow them here too, but for the moment it doesn't seem\n * useful in the statements that use ConstraintAttr.)\n */\nConstraintAttr:\n\t\t\tDEFERRABLE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_DEFERRABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NOT DEFERRABLE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_NOT_DEFERRABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| INITIALLY DEFERRED\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_DEFERRED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| INITIALLY IMMEDIATE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_IMMEDIATE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ENFORCED\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_ENFORCED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NOT ENFORCED\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_NOT_ENFORCED;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\nTableLikeClause:\n\t\t\tLIKE qualified_name TableLikeOptionList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTableLikeClause *n = makeNode(TableLikeClause);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relationOid = InvalidOid;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nTableLikeOptionList:\n\t\t\t\tTableLikeOptionList INCLUDING TableLikeOption\t{ $$ = $1 | $3; }\n\t\t\t\t| TableLikeOptionList EXCLUDING TableLikeOption\t{ $$ = $1 & ~$3; }\n\t\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = 0; }\n\t\t;\n\nTableLikeOption:\n\t\t\t\tCOMMENTS\t\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_COMMENTS; }\n\t\t\t\t| COMPRESSION\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_COMPRESSION; }\n\t\t\t\t| CONSTRAINTS\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_CONSTRAINTS; }\n\t\t\t\t| DEFAULTS\t\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_DEFAULTS; }\n\t\t\t\t| IDENTITY_P\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_IDENTITY; }\n\t\t\t\t| GENERATED\t\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_GENERATED; }\n\t\t\t\t| INDEXES\t\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_INDEXES; }\n\t\t\t\t| STATISTICS\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_STATISTICS; }\n\t\t\t\t| STORAGE\t\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_STORAGE; }\n\t\t\t\t| ALL\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CREATE_TABLE_LIKE_ALL; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/* ConstraintElem specifies constraint syntax which is not embedded into\n *\ta column definition. ColConstraintElem specifies the embedded form.\n * - thomas 1997-12-03\n */\nTableConstraint:\n\t\t\tCONSTRAINT name ConstraintElem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = castNode(Constraint, $3);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->conname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ConstraintElem\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\nConstraintElem:\n\t\t\tCHECK '(' a_expr ')' ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_CHECK;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->raw_expr = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cooked_expr = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($5, @5, \"CHECK\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, &n->is_enforced, &n->skip_validation,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->is_no_inherit, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NOT NULL_P ColId ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_NOTNULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->keys = list_make1(makeString($3));\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($4, @4, \"NOT NULL\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, NULL, &n->skip_validation,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->is_no_inherit, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| UNIQUE opt_unique_null_treatment '(' columnList opt_without_overlaps ')' opt_c_include opt_definition OptConsTableSpace\n\t\t\t\tConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_UNIQUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->nulls_not_distinct = !$2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->keys = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->without_overlaps = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->including = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexspace = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($10, @10, \"UNIQUE\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| UNIQUE ExistingIndex ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_UNIQUE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->keys = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->including = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexspace = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($3, @3, \"UNIQUE\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| PRIMARY KEY '(' columnList opt_without_overlaps ')' opt_c_include opt_definition OptConsTableSpace\n\t\t\t\tConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_PRIMARY;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->keys = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->without_overlaps = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->including = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexspace = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($10, @10, \"PRIMARY KEY\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| PRIMARY KEY ExistingIndex ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_PRIMARY;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->keys = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->including = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexspace = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($4, @4, \"PRIMARY KEY\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| EXCLUDE access_method_clause '(' ExclusionConstraintList ')'\n\t\t\t\topt_c_include opt_definition OptConsTableSpace OptWhereClause\n\t\t\t\tConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_EXCLUSION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->access_method = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->exclusions = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->including = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexname = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->indexspace = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->where_clause = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($10, @10, \"EXCLUDE\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FOREIGN KEY '(' columnList optionalPeriodName ')' REFERENCES qualified_name\n\t\t\t\topt_column_and_period_list key_match key_actions ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_FOREIGN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->pktable = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_attrs = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tif ($5)\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_attrs = lappend(n->fk_attrs, $5);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_with_period = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tn->pk_attrs = linitial($9);\n\t\t\t\t\tif (lsecond($9))\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->pk_attrs = lappend(n->pk_attrs, lsecond($9));\n\t\t\t\t\t\tn->pk_with_period = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_matchtype = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_upd_action = ($11)->updateAction->action;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_del_action = ($11)->deleteAction->action;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fk_del_set_cols = ($11)->deleteAction->cols;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($12, @12, \"FOREIGN KEY\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->is_enforced, &n->skip_validation, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * DomainConstraint is separate from TableConstraint because the syntax for\n * NOT NULL constraints is different.  For table constraints, we need to\n * accept a column name, but for domain constraints, we don't.  (We could\n * accept something like NOT NULL VALUE, but that seems weird.)  CREATE DOMAIN\n * (which uses ColQualList) has for a long time accepted NOT NULL without a\n * column name, so it makes sense that ALTER DOMAIN (which uses\n * DomainConstraint) does as well.  None of these syntaxes are per SQL\n * standard; we are just living with the bits of inconsistency that have built\n * up over time.\n */\nDomainConstraint:\n\t\t\tCONSTRAINT name DomainConstraintElem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = castNode(Constraint, $3);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->conname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DomainConstraintElem\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\nDomainConstraintElem:\n\t\t\tCHECK '(' a_expr ')' ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_CHECK;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->raw_expr = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cooked_expr = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($5, @5, \"CHECK\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, NULL, &n->skip_validation,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->is_no_inherit, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_enforced = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initially_valid = !n->skip_validation;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NOT NULL_P ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tConstraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->contype = CONSTR_NOTNULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->keys = list_make1(makeString(\"value\"));\n\t\t\t\t\t/* no NOT VALID, NO INHERIT support */\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($3, @3, \"NOT NULL\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initially_valid = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_no_inherit:\tNO INHERIT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{  $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{  $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_without_overlaps:\n\t\t\tWITHOUT OVERLAPS\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t;\n\nopt_column_list:\n\t\t\t'(' columnList ')'\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncolumnList:\n\t\t\tcolumnElem\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| columnList ',' columnElem\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\noptionalPeriodName:\n\t\t\t',' PERIOD columnElem { $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/               { $$ = NULL; }\n\t;\n\nopt_column_and_period_list:\n\t\t\t'(' columnList optionalPeriodName ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2($2, $3); }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2(NIL, NULL); }\n\t\t;\n\ncolumnElem: ColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) makeString($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_c_include:\tINCLUDE '(' columnList ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t |\t\t/* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nkey_match:  MATCH FULL\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = FKCONSTR_MATCH_FULL;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| MATCH PARTIAL\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"MATCH PARTIAL not yet implemented\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t FKCONSTR_MATCH_SIMPLE;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nExclusionConstraintList:\n\t\t\tExclusionConstraintElem\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| ExclusionConstraintList ',' $3);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* allow OPERATOR() decoration for the benefit of ruleutils.c */\n\t\t\t| index_elem WITH OPERATOR '(' any_operator ')'\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make2($1, $5);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nOptWhereClause:\n\t\t\tWHERE '(' a_expr ')'\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nkey_actions:\n\t\t\tkey_update\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| key_delete\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| key_update key_delete\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| key_delete key_update\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyActions *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyActions));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->updateAction->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deleteAction->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nkey_update: ON UPDATE key_action\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif (($3)->cols)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"a column list with %s is only supported for ON DELETE actions\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t($3)->action == FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETNULL ? \"SET NULL\" : \"SET DEFAULT\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $3;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nkey_delete: ON DELETE_P key_action\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $3;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nkey_action:\n\t\t\tNO ACTION\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CASCADE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_CASCADE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET NULL_P opt_column_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETNULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cols = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET DEFAULT opt_column_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKeyAction *n = palloc(sizeof(KeyAction));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETDEFAULT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cols = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nOptInherit: INHERITS '(' qualified_name_list ')'\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* Optional partition key specification */\nOptPartitionSpec: PartitionSpec\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nPartitionSpec: PARTITION BY ColId '(' part_params ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionSpec);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->strategy = parsePartitionStrategy($3, @3, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->partParams = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\npart_params:\tpart_elem\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| part_params ',' part_elem\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\npart_elem: ColId opt_collate opt_qualified_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->expr = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collation = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opclass = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| func_expr_windowless opt_collate opt_qualified_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->expr = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collation = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opclass = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| '(' a_expr ')' opt_collate opt_qualified_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->expr = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->collation = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opclass = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = @1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ntable_access_method_clause:\n\t\t\tUSING name\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* WITHOUT OIDS is legacy only */\nOptWith:\n\t\t\tWITH reloptions\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| WITHOUT OIDS\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nOnCommitOption:  ON COMMIT DROP\t\t\t\t{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_DROP; }\n\t\t\t| ON COMMIT DELETE_P ROWS\t\t{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_DELETE_ROWS; }\n\t\t\t| ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS\t\t{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_PRESERVE_ROWS; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = ONCOMMIT_NOOP; }\n\t\t;\n\nOptTableSpace:   TABLESPACE name\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nOptConsTableSpace:   USING INDEX TABLESPACE name\t{ $$ = $4; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nExistingIndex:   USING INDEX name\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE STATISTICS [[IF NOT EXISTS] stats_name] [(stat types)]\n *\t\t\t\t\tON expression-list FROM from_list\n *\n * Note: the expectation here is that the clauses after ON are a subset of\n * SELECT syntax, allowing for expressions and joined tables, and probably\n * someday a WHERE clause.  Much less than that is currently implemented,\n * but the grammar accepts it and then we'll throw FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED\n * errors as necessary at execution.\n *\n * Statistics name is optional unless IF NOT EXISTS is specified.\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateStatsStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE STATISTICS opt_qualified_name\n\t\t\topt_name_list ON stats_params FROM from_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStatsStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStatsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stat_types = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->exprs = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relations = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stxcomment = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE STATISTICS IF_P NOT EXISTS any_name\n\t\t\topt_name_list ON stats_params FROM from_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateStatsStmt *n = makeNode(CreateStatsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stat_types = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->exprs = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relations = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stxcomment = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Statistics attributes can be either simple column references, or arbitrary\n * expressions in parens.  For compatibility with index attributes permitted\n * in CREATE INDEX, we allow an expression that's just a function call to be\n * written without parens.\n */\n\nstats_params:\tstats_param\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| stats_params ',' stats_param\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nstats_param:\tColId\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeNode(StatsElem);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->name = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->expr = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| func_expr_windowless\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeNode(StatsElem);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->expr = $1;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| '(' a_expr ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeNode(StatsElem);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->expr = $2;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tALTER STATISTICS [IF EXISTS] stats_name\n *\t\t\t\t\tSET STATISTICS  <SignedIconst>\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterStatsStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER STATISTICS any_name SET STATISTICS set_statistics_value\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterStatsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterStatsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stxstattarget = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER STATISTICS IF_P EXISTS any_name SET STATISTICS set_statistics_value\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterStatsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterStatsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->stxstattarget = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE TABLE relname AS SelectStmt [ WITH [NO] DATA ]\n *\n *\n * Note: SELECT ... INTO is a now-deprecated alternative for this.\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateAsStmt:\n\t\tCREATE OptTemp TABLE create_as_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->query = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->into = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->is_select_into = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->rel->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->skipData = !($7);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) ctas;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptTemp TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS create_as_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->query = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->into = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->is_select_into = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->rel->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->skipData = !($10);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) ctas;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncreate_as_target:\n\t\t\tqualified_name opt_column_list table_access_method_clause\n\t\t\tOptWith OnCommitOption OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeNode(IntoClause);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->rel = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->colNames = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->accessMethod = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->options = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->onCommit = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->tableSpaceName = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->viewQuery = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->skipData = false;\t\t/* might get changed later */\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_with_data:\n\t\t\tWITH DATA_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| WITH NO DATA_P\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW relname AS SelectStmt\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateMatViewStmt:\n\t\tCREATE OptNoLog MATERIALIZED VIEW create_mv_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->query = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->into = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->objtype = OBJECT_MATVIEW;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->is_select_into = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */\n\t\t\t\t\t$5->rel->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$5->skipData = !($8);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) ctas;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE OptNoLog MATERIALIZED VIEW IF_P NOT EXISTS create_mv_target AS SelectStmt opt_with_data\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTableAsStmt *ctas = makeNode(CreateTableAsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->query = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->into = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->objtype = OBJECT_MATVIEW;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->is_select_into = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tctas->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* cram additional flags into the IntoClause */\n\t\t\t\t\t$8->rel->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$8->skipData = !($11);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) ctas;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncreate_mv_target:\n\t\t\tqualified_name opt_column_list table_access_method_clause opt_reloptions OptTableSpace\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeNode(IntoClause);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->rel = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->colNames = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->accessMethod = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->options = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->onCommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->tableSpaceName = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->viewQuery = NULL;\t\t/* filled at analysis time */\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->skipData = false;\t\t/* might get changed later */\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nOptNoLog:\tUNLOGGED\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_UNLOGGED; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tREFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW qualified_name\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nRefreshMatViewStmt:\n\t\t\tREFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW opt_concurrently qualified_name opt_with_data\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tRefreshMatViewStmt *n = makeNode(RefreshMatViewStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->skipData = !($6);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE SEQUENCE seqname\n *\t\t\t\tALTER SEQUENCE seqname\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateSeqStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE OptTemp SEQUENCE qualified_name OptSeqOptList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSeqStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSeqStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->sequence = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ownerId = InvalidOid;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE OptTemp SEQUENCE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name OptSeqOptList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateSeqStmt *n = makeNode(CreateSeqStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$7->relpersistence = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->sequence = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ownerId = InvalidOid;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nAlterSeqStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER SEQUENCE qualified_name SeqOptList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSeqStmt *n = makeNode(AlterSeqStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->sequence = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SEQUENCE IF_P EXISTS qualified_name SeqOptList\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterSeqStmt *n = makeNode(AlterSeqStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->sequence = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t;\n\nOptSeqOptList: SeqOptList\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nOptParenthesizedSeqOptList: '(' SeqOptList ')'\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nSeqOptList: SeqOptElem\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| SeqOptList SeqOptElem\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nSeqOptElem: AS SimpleTypename\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"as\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CACHE NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"cache\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CYCLE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"cycle\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NO CYCLE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"cycle\", (Node *) makeBoolean(false), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| INCREMENT opt_by NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"increment\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| LOGGED\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"logged\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MAXVALUE NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"maxvalue\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MINVALUE NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"minvalue\", (Node *) $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NO MAXVALUE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"maxvalue\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NO MINVALUE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"minvalue\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| OWNED BY any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"owned_by\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SEQUENCE NAME_P any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"sequence_name\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| START opt_with NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"start\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RESTART\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"restart\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RESTART opt_with NumericOnly\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"restart\", (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| UNLOGGED\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"unlogged\", NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_by:\t\tBY\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t  ;\n\nNumericOnly:\n\t\t\tFCONST\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeFloat($1); }\n\t\t\t| '+' FCONST\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeFloat($2); }\n\t\t\t| '-' FCONST\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFloat\t   *f = makeFloat($2);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tdoNegateFloat(f);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) f;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SignedIconst\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeInteger($1); }\n\t\t;\n\nNumericOnly_list:\tNumericOnly\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t\t| NumericOnly_list ',' NumericOnly\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERIES :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE [OR REPLACE] [TRUSTED] [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE ...\n *\t\t\t\tDROP [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreatePLangStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE opt_or_replace opt_trusted opt_procedural LANGUAGE name\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t * We now interpret parameterless CREATE LANGUAGE as\n\t\t\t\t * CREATE EXTENSION.  \"OR REPLACE\" is silently translated\n\t\t\t\t * to \"IF NOT EXISTS\", which isn't quite the same, but\n\t\t\t\t * seems more useful than throwing an error.  We just\n\t\t\t\t * ignore TRUSTED, as the previous code would have too.\n\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\tCreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = $2;\n\t\t\t\tn->extname = $6;\n\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE opt_or_replace opt_trusted opt_procedural LANGUAGE name\n\t\t\t  HANDLER handler_name opt_inline_handler opt_validator\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tCreatePLangStmt *n = makeNode(CreatePLangStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->replace = $2;\n\t\t\t\tn->plname = $6;\n\t\t\t\tn->plhandler = $8;\n\t\t\t\tn->plinline = $9;\n\t\t\t\tn->plvalidator = $10;\n\t\t\t\tn->pltrusted = $3;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_trusted:\n\t\t\tTRUSTED\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* This ought to be just func_name, but that causes reduce/reduce conflicts\n * (CREATE LANGUAGE is the only place where func_name isn't followed by '(').\n * Work around by using simple names, instead.\n */\nhandler_name:\n\t\t\tname\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }\n\t\t\t| name attrs\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lcons(makeString($1), $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_inline_handler:\n\t\t\tINLINE_P handler_name\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nvalidator_clause:\n\t\t\tVALIDATOR handler_name\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| NO VALIDATOR\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_validator:\n\t\t\tvalidator_clause\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_procedural:\n\t\t\tPROCEDURAL\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE TABLESPACE tablespace LOCATION '/path/to/tablespace/'\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateTableSpaceStmt: CREATE TABLESPACE name OptTableSpaceOwner LOCATION Sconst opt_reloptions\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTableSpaceStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTableSpaceStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->owner = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->location = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nOptTableSpaceOwner: OWNER RoleSpec\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY */\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tDROP TABLESPACE <tablespace>\n *\n *\t\tNo need for drop behaviour as we cannot implement dependencies for\n *\t\tobjects in other databases; we can only support RESTRICT.\n *\n ****************************************************************************/\n\nDropTableSpaceStmt: DROP TABLESPACE name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropTableSpaceStmt *n = makeNode(DropTableSpaceStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t|  DROP TABLESPACE IF_P EXISTS name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropTableSpaceStmt *n = makeNode(DropTableSpaceStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tablespacename = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE EXTENSION extension\n *             [ WITH ] [ SCHEMA schema ] [ VERSION version ]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateExtensionStmt: CREATE EXTENSION name opt_with create_extension_opt_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t| CREATE EXTENSION IF_P NOT EXISTS name opt_with create_extension_opt_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncreate_extension_opt_list:\n\t\t\tcreate_extension_opt_list create_extension_opt_item\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\ncreate_extension_opt_item:\n\t\t\tSCHEMA name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"schema\", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| VERSION_P NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"new_version\", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FROM NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE EXTENSION ... FROM is no longer supported\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CASCADE\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"cascade\", (Node *) makeBoolean(true), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * ALTER EXTENSION name UPDATE [ TO version ]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterExtensionStmt: ALTER EXTENSION name UPDATE alter_extension_opt_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_extension_opt_list:\n\t\t\talter_extension_opt_list alter_extension_opt_item\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_extension_opt_item:\n\t\t\tTO NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem(\"new_version\", (Node *) makeString($2), @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * ALTER EXTENSION name ADD/DROP object-identifier\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterExtensionContentsStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER EXTENSION name add_drop object_type_name name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) makeString($6);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop object_type_any_name any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop CAST '(' Typename AS Typename ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_CAST;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) list_make2($7, $9);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop DOMAIN_P Typename\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop FUNCTION function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop OPERATOR operator_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_OPERATOR;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop OPERATOR CLASS any_name USING name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_OPCLASS;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($9), $7);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($9), $7);\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop ROUTINE function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop TRANSFORM FOR Typename LANGUAGE name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TRANSFORM;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) list_make2($7, makeString($9));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER EXTENSION name add_drop TYPE_P Typename\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterExtensionContentsStmt *n = makeNode(AlterExtensionContentsStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->extname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->action = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER name options\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateFdwStmt: CREATE FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name opt_fdw_options create_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateFdwStmt *n = makeNode(CreateFdwStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fdwname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->func_options = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nfdw_option:\n\t\t\tHANDLER handler_name\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"handler\", (Node *) $2, @1); }\n\t\t\t| NO HANDLER\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"handler\", NULL, @1); }\n\t\t\t| VALIDATOR handler_name\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"validator\", (Node *) $2, @1); }\n\t\t\t| NO VALIDATOR\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem(\"validator\", NULL, @1); }\n\t\t;\n\nfdw_options:\n\t\t\tfdw_option\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| fdw_options fdw_option\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_fdw_options:\n\t\t\tfdw_options\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tALTER FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER name options\n *\n ****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterFdwStmt: ALTER FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name opt_fdw_options
