*) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name fdw_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterFdwStmt *n = makeNode(AlterFdwStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fdwname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->func_options = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* Options definition for CREATE FDW, SERVER and USER MAPPING */\ncreate_generic_options:\n\t\t\tOPTIONS '(' generic_option_list ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\ngeneric_option_list:\n\t\t\tgeneric_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| generic_option_list ',' generic_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* Options definition for ALTER FDW, SERVER and USER MAPPING */\nalter_generic_options:\n\t\t\tOPTIONS\t'(' alter_generic_option_list ')'\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t;\n\nalter_generic_option_list:\n\t\t\talter_generic_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1($1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| alter_generic_option_list ',' alter_generic_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, $3);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nalter_generic_option_elem:\n\t\t\tgeneric_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $1;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SET generic_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->defaction = DEFELEM_SET;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ADD_P generic_option_elem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$->defaction = DEFELEM_ADD;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP generic_option_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElemExtended(NULL, $2, NULL, DEFELEM_DROP, @2);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ngeneric_option_elem:\n\t\t\tgeneric_option_name generic_option_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, $2, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ngeneric_option_name:\n\t\t\t\tColLabel\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* We could use def_arg here, but the spec only requires string literals */\ngeneric_option_arg:\n\t\t\t\tSconst\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE SERVER name [TYPE] [VERSION] [OPTIONS]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateForeignServerStmt: CREATE SERVER name opt_type opt_foreign_server_version\n\t\t\t\t\t\t FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->fdwname = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t| CREATE SERVER IF_P NOT EXISTS name opt_type }\n\t\t;\n\n\nforeign_server_version:\n\t\t\tVERSION_P Sconst\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t|\tVERSION_P NULL_P\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_foreign_server_version:\n\t\t\tforeign_server_version\t{ $$ = $1; $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->has_version = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER SERVER name foreign_server_version\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterForeignServerStmt *n = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE FOREIGN TABLE relname (...) SERVER name (...)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateForeignTableStmt:\n\t\tCREATE FOREIGN TABLE qualified_name\n\t\t\t'(' OptTableElementList ')'\n\t\t\tOptInherit SERVER name create_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateForeignTableStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignTableStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->relpersistence = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.relation = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.tableElts = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.inhRelations = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.tablespacename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* FDW-specific data */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE FOREIGN TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.tablespacename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* FDW-specific data */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE FOREIGN TABLE qualified_name\n\t\t\tPARTITION OF qualified_name OptTypedTableElementList PartitionBoundSpec\n\t\t\tSERVER name create_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateForeignTableStmt *n = makeNode(CreateForeignTableStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$4->relpersistence = RELPERSISTENCE_PERMANENT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.relation = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.inhRelations = list_make1($7);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.tableElts = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.partbound = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.tablespacename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* FDW-specific data */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $12;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE FOREIGN TABLE IF_P NOT EXISTS qualified_name\n\t\t\tPARTITION OF qualified_name OptTypedTableElementList $12;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.ofTypename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.constraints = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.options = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.oncommit = ONCOMMIT_NOOP;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.tablespacename = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->base.if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t/* FDW-specific data */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $15;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\tIMPORT FOREIGN SCHEMA remote_schema\n *\t\t\t\t[ { LIMIT TO | EXCEPT } ( table_list ) ]\n *\t\t\t\tFROM SERVER server_name INTO local_schema [ OPTIONS (...) ]\n *\n ****************************************************************************/\n\nImportForeignSchemaStmt:\n\t\tIMPORT_P FOREIGN SCHEMA name import_qualification\n\t\t  FROM SERVER name INTO name create_generic_options\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tImportForeignSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(ImportForeignSchemaStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->server_name = $8;\n\t\t\t\tn->remote_schema = $4;\n\t\t\t\tn->local_schema = $10;\n\t\t\t\tn->list_type = $5->type;\n\t\t\t\tn->table_list = $5->table_names;\n\t\t\t\tn->options = $11;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nimport_qualification_type:\n\t\tLIMIT TO\t\t\t\t{ $$ = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_LIMIT_TO; }\n\t\t| EXCEPT\t\t\t\t{ $$ = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_EXCEPT; }\n\t\t;\n\nimport_qualification:\n\t\timport_qualification_type '(' relation_expr_list ')'\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tImportQual *n = (ImportQual *) palloc(sizeof(ImportQual));\n\n\t\t\t\tn->type = $1;\n\t\t\t\tn->table_names = $3;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tImportQual *n = (ImportQual *) palloc(sizeof(ImportQual));\n\t\t\t\tn->type = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_ALL;\n\t\t\t\tn->table_names = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name [OPTIONS]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateUserMappingStmt: CREATE USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name create_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(CreateUserMappingStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->user = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t| CREATE USER MAPPING IF_P NOT EXISTS FOR auth_ident SERVER name create_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(CreateUserMappingStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->user = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* User mapping authorization identifier */\nauth_ident: RoleSpec\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| USER\t\t\t\t{ $$ = makeRoleSpec(ROLESPEC_CURRENT_USER, @1); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tDROP USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name\n *\n * XXX you'd think this should have a CASCADE/RESTRICT option, even if it's\n * only pro forma; but the SQL standard doesn't show one.\n ****************************************************************************/\n\nDropUserMappingStmt: DROP USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(DropUserMappingStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->user = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t|  DROP USER MAPPING IF_P EXISTS FOR auth_ident SERVER name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(DropUserMappingStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->user = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tALTER USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name OPTIONS\n *\n ****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterUserMappingStmt: ALTER USER MAPPING FOR auth_ident SERVER name alter_generic_options\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterUserMappingStmt *n = makeNode(AlterUserMappingStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->user = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->servername = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->options = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERIES:\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE POLICY name ON table\n *\t\t\t\t\t[AS { PERMISSIVE | RESTRICTIVE } ]\n *\t\t\t\t\t[FOR { SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE } ]\n *\t\t\t\t\t[TO role, ...]\n *\t\t\t\t\t[USING (qual)] [WITH CHECK (with check qual)]\n *\t\t\t\tALTER POLICY name ON table [TO role, ...]\n *\t\t\t\t\t[USING (qual)] [WITH CHECK (with check qual)]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreatePolicyStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE POLICY name ON qualified_name RowSecurityDefaultPermissive\n\t\t\t\tRowSecurityDefaultForCmd RowSecurityDefaultToRole\n\t\t\t\tRowSecurityOptionalExpr RowSecurityOptionalWithCheck\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreatePolicyStmt *n = makeNode(CreatePolicyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->policy_name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->table = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->permissive = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cmd_name = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->qual = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->with_check = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nAlterPolicyStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER POLICY name ON qualified_name RowSecurityOptionalToRole\n\t\t\t\tRowSecurityOptionalExpr RowSecurityOptionalWithCheck\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterPolicyStmt *n = makeNode(AlterPolicyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->policy_name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->table = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->qual = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->with_check = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nRowSecurityOptionalExpr:\n\t\t\tUSING '(' a_expr ')'\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nRowSecurityOptionalWithCheck:\n\t\t\tWITH CHECK '(' a_expr ')'\t\t{ $$ = $4; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nRowSecurityDefaultToRole:\n\t\t\tTO role_list\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1(makeRoleSpec(ROLESPEC_PUBLIC, -1)); }\n\t\t;\n\nRowSecurityOptionalToRole:\n\t\t\tTO role_list\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nRowSecurityDefaultPermissive:\n\t\t\tAS IDENT\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif (strcmp($2, \"permissive\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = true;\n\t\t\t\t\telse if (strcmp($2, \"restrictive\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t$$ = false;\n\t\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"unrecognized row security option \\\"%s\\\"\", $2),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errhint(\"Only PERMISSIVE or RESTRICTIVE policies are supported currently.\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t;\n\nRowSecurityDefaultForCmd:\n\t\t\tFOR row_security_cmd\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t{ $$ = \"all\"; }\n\t\t;\n\nrow_security_cmd:\n\t\t\tALL\t\t\t\t{ $$ = \"all\"; }\n\t\t|\tSELECT\t\t\t{ $$ = \"select\"; }\n\t\t|\tINSERT\t\t\t{ $$ = \"insert\"; }\n\t\t|\tUPDATE\t\t\t{ $$ = \"update\"; }\n\t\t|\tDELETE_P\t\t{ $$ = \"delete\"; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *             CREATE ACCESS METHOD name HANDLER handler_name\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateAmStmt: CREATE ACCESS METHOD name TYPE_P am_type HANDLER handler_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateAmStmt *n = makeNode(CreateAmStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->amname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->handler_name = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->amtype = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nam_type:\n\t\t\tINDEX\t\t\t{ $$ = AMTYPE_INDEX; }\n\t\t|\tTABLE\t\t\t{ $$ = AMTYPE_TABLE; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERIES :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE TRIGGER ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateTrigStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE opt_or_replace TRIGGER name TriggerActionTime TriggerEvents ON\n\t\t\tqualified_name TriggerReferencing TriggerForSpec TriggerWhen\n\t\t\tEXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' TriggerFuncArgs ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTrigStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isconstraint = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->trigname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->funcname = $14;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $16;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->row = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->timing = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->events = intVal(linitial($6));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->columns = (List *) lsecond($6);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whenClause = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->transitionRels = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->deferrable = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->initdeferred = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->constrrel = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t  | CREATE opt_or_replace CONSTRAINT TRIGGER name AFTER TriggerEvents ON\n\t\t\tqualified_name OptConstrFromTable ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\tFOR EACH ROW TriggerWhen\n\t\t\tEXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' TriggerFuncArgs ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTrigStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (n->replace) /* not supported, see CreateTrigger */\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE OR REPLACE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER is not supported\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isconstraint = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->trigname = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relation = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->funcname = $18;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $20;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->row = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->timing = TRIGGER_TYPE_AFTER;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->events = intVal(linitial($7));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->columns = (List *) lsecond($7);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whenClause = $15;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->transitionRels = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tprocessCASbits($11, @11, \"TRIGGER\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, NULL, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->constrrel = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerActionTime:\n\t\t\tBEFORE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_BEFORE; }\n\t\t\t| AFTER\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_AFTER; }\n\t\t\t| INSTEAD OF\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_INSTEAD; }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerEvents:\n\t\t\tTriggerOneEvent\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| TriggerEvents OR TriggerOneEvent\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tint\t\t\tevents1 = intVal(linitial($1));\n\t\t\t\t\tint\t\t\tevents2 = intVal(linitial($3));\n\t\t\t\t\tList\t   *columns1 = (List *) lsecond($1);\n\t\t\t\t\tList\t   *columns2 = (List *) lsecond($3);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif (events1 & events2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tparser_yyerror(\"duplicate trigger events specified\");\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * concat'ing the columns lists loses information about\n\t\t\t\t\t * which columns went with which event, but so long as\n\t\t\t\t\t * only UPDATE carries columns and we disallow multiple\n\t\t\t\t\t * UPDATE items, it doesn't matter.  Command execution\n\t\t\t\t\t * should just ignore the columns for non-UPDATE events.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make2(makeInteger(events1 | events2),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tlist_concat(columns1, columns2));\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerOneEvent:\n\t\t\tINSERT\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_INSERT), NIL); }\n\t\t\t| DELETE_P\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_DELETE), NIL); }\n\t\t\t| UPDATE\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_UPDATE), NIL); }\n\t\t\t| UPDATE OF columnList\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_UPDATE), $3); }\n\t\t\t| TRUNCATE\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_TRUNCATE), NIL); }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerReferencing:\n\t\t\tREFERENCING TriggerTransitions\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerTransitions:\n\t\t\tTriggerTransition\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| TriggerTransitions TriggerTransition\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerTransition:\n\t\t\tTransitionOldOrNew TransitionRowOrTable opt_as TransitionRelName\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTriggerTransition *n = makeNode(TriggerTransition);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isNew = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isTable = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nTransitionOldOrNew:\n\t\t\tNEW\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| OLD\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nTransitionRowOrTable:\n\t\t\tTABLE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * According to the standard, lack of a keyword here implies ROW.\n\t\t\t * Support for that would require prohibiting ROW entirely here,\n\t\t\t * reserving the keyword ROW, and/or requiring AS (instead of\n\t\t\t * allowing it to be optional, as the standard specifies) as the\n\t\t\t * next token.  Requiring ROW seems cleanest and easiest to\n\t\t\t * explain.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t| ROW\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nTransitionRelName:\n\t\t\tColId\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerForSpec:\n\t\t\tFOR TriggerForOptEach TriggerForType\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = $3;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * If ROW/STATEMENT not specified, default to\n\t\t\t\t\t * STATEMENT, per SQL\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = false;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerForOptEach:\n\t\t\tEACH\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerForType:\n\t\t\tROW\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| STATEMENT\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerWhen:\n\t\t\tWHEN '(' a_expr ')'\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $3; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nFUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE:\n\t\t\tFUNCTION\n\t\t|\tPROCEDURE\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerFuncArgs:\n\t\t\tTriggerFuncArg\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| TriggerFuncArgs ',' TriggerFuncArg\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nTriggerFuncArg:\n\t\t\tIconst\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) makeString(psprintf(\"%d\", $1));\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FCONST\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t\t| Sconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t\t| ColLabel\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t;\n\nOptConstrFromTable:\n\t\t\tFROM qualified_name\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nConstraintAttributeSpec:\n\t\t\t/*EMPTY*/\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = 0; }\n\t\t\t| ConstraintAttributeSpec ConstraintAttributeElem\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * We must complain about conflicting options.\n\t\t\t\t\t * We could, but choose not to, complain about redundant\n\t\t\t\t\t * options (ie, where $2's bit is already set in $1).\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tint\t\tnewspec = $1 | $2;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* special message for this case */\n\t\t\t\t\tif ((newspec & (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED)) == (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"constraint declared INITIALLY DEFERRED must be DEFERRABLE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\t\t\t\t\t/* generic message for other conflicts */\n\t\t\t\t\tif ((newspec & (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_DEFERRABLE)) == (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_DEFERRABLE) ||\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(newspec & (CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED)) == (CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED) ||\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(newspec & (CAS_NOT_ENFORCED | CAS_ENFORCED)) == (CAS_NOT_ENFORCED | CAS_ENFORCED))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting constraint properties\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@2)));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = newspec;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nConstraintAttributeElem:\n\t\t\tNOT DEFERRABLE\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE; }\n\t\t\t| DEFERRABLE\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_DEFERRABLE; }\n\t\t\t| INITIALLY IMMEDIATE\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE; }\n\t\t\t| INITIALLY DEFERRED\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED; }\n\t\t\t| NOT VALID\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_NOT_VALID; }\n\t\t\t| NO INHERIT\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_NO_INHERIT; }\n\t\t\t| NOT ENFORCED\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_NOT_ENFORCED; }\n\t\t\t| ENFORCED\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = CAS_ENFORCED; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERIES :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE EVENT TRIGGER ...\n *\t\t\t\tALTER EVENT TRIGGER ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateEventTrigStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE EVENT TRIGGER name ON ColLabel\n\t\t\tEXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateEventTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateEventTrigStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->trigname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->eventname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whenclause = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->funcname = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t  | CREATE EVENT TRIGGER name ON ColLabel\n\t\t\tWHEN event_trigger_when_list\n\t\t\tEXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateEventTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateEventTrigStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->trigname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->eventname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->whenclause = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->funcname = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nevent_trigger_when_list:\n\t\t  event_trigger_when_item\n\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t| event_trigger_when_list AND event_trigger_when_item\n\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nevent_trigger_when_item:\n\t\tColId IN_P '(' event_trigger_value_list ')'\n\t\t\t{ $$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $4, @1); }\n\t\t;\n\nevent_trigger_value_list:\n\t\t  SCONST\n\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }\n\t\t| event_trigger_value_list ',' SCONST\n\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }\n\t\t;\n\nAlterEventTrigStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER EVENT TRIGGER name enable_trigger\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterEventTrigStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEventTrigStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->trigname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->tgenabled = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nenable_trigger:\n\t\t\tENABLE_P\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_FIRES_ON_ORIGIN; }\n\t\t\t| ENABLE_P REPLICA\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_FIRES_ON_REPLICA; }\n\t\t\t| ENABLE_P ALWAYS\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_FIRES_ALWAYS; }\n\t\t\t| DISABLE_P\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = TRIGGER_DISABLED; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE ASSERTION ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateAssertionStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE ASSERTION any_name CHECK '(' a_expr ')' ConstraintAttributeSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CREATE ASSERTION is not yet implemented\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@1)));\n\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY :\n *\t\t\t\tdefine (aggregate,operator,type)\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nDefineStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE opt_or_replace AGGREGATE func_name aggr_args definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oldstyle = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE opt_or_replace AGGREGATE func_name old_aggr_definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/* old-style (pre-8.2) syntax for CREATE AGGREGATE */\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oldstyle = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->replace = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE OPERATOR any_operator definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_OPERATOR;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oldstyle = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TYPE_P any_name definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oldstyle = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TYPE_P any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/* Shell type (identified by lack of definition) */\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->oldstyle = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TYPE_P any_name AS '(' OptTableFuncElementList ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCompositeTypeStmt *n = makeNode(CompositeTypeStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* can't use qualified_name, sigh */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typevar = makeRangeVarFromAnyName($3, @3, yyscanner);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->coldeflist = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TYPE_P any_name AS ENUM_P '(' opt_enum_val_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateEnumStmt *n = makeNode(CreateEnumStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->vals = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TYPE_P any_name AS RANGE definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateRangeStmt *n = makeNode(CreateRangeStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->params = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TEXT_P SEARCH PARSER any_name definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_TSPARSER;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE TEXT_P SEARCH DICTIONARY any_name definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE COLLATION IF_P NOT EXISTS any_name definition\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE COLLATION any_name FROM any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = list_make1(makeDefElem(\"from\", (Node *) $5, @5));\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| CREATE COLLATION IF_P NOT EXISTS any_name FROM any_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDefineStmt *n = makeNode(DefineStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->kind = OBJECT_COLLATION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->args = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->defnames = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->definition = list_make1(makeDefElem(\"from\", (Node *) $8, @8));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->if_not_exists = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ndefinition: '(' def_list ')'\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\ndef_list:\tdef_elem\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| def_list ',' def_elem\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\ndef_elem:\tColLabel '=' def_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ColLabel\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* Note: any simple identifier will be returned as a type name! */\ndef_arg:\tfunc_type\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }\n\t\t\t| reserved_keyword\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString(pstrdup($1)); }\n\t\t\t| qual_all_Op\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }\n\t\t\t| NumericOnly\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) $1; }\n\t\t\t| Sconst\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString($1); }\n\t\t\t| NONE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = (Node *) makeString(pstrdup($1)); }\n\t\t;\n\nold_aggr_definition: '(' old_aggr_list ')'\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t;\n\nold_aggr_list: old_aggr_elem\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| old_aggr_list ',' old_aggr_elem\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * Must use IDENT here to avoid reduce/reduce conflicts; fortunately none of\n * the item names needed in old aggregate definitions are likely to become\n * SQL keywords.\n */\nold_aggr_elem:  IDENT '=' def_arg\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_enum_val_list:\n\t\tenum_val_list\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nenum_val_list:\tSconst\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }\n\t\t\t| enum_val_list ',' Sconst\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\tALTER TYPE enumtype ADD ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nAlterEnumStmt:\n\t\tALTER TYPE_P any_name ADD_P VALUE_P opt_if_not_exists Sconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\tn->oldVal = NULL;\n\t\t\t\tn->newVal = $7;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValNeighbor = NULL;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValIsAfter = true;\n\t\t\t\tn->skipIfNewValExists = $6;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t | ALTER TYPE_P any_name ADD_P VALUE_P opt_if_not_exists Sconst BEFORE Sconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\tn->oldVal = NULL;\n\t\t\t\tn->newVal = $7;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValNeighbor = $9;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValIsAfter = false;\n\t\t\t\tn->skipIfNewValExists = $6;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t | ALTER TYPE_P any_name ADD_P VALUE_P opt_if_not_exists Sconst AFTER Sconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\tn->oldVal = NULL;\n\t\t\t\tn->newVal = $7;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValNeighbor = $9;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValIsAfter = true;\n\t\t\t\tn->skipIfNewValExists = $6;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t | ALTER TYPE_P any_name RENAME VALUE_P Sconst TO Sconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAlterEnumStmt *n = makeNode(AlterEnumStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->typeName = $3;\n\t\t\t\tn->oldVal = $6;\n\t\t\t\tn->newVal = $8;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValNeighbor = NULL;\n\t\t\t\tn->newValIsAfter = false;\n\t\t\t\tn->skipIfNewValExists = false;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t | ALTER TYPE_P any_name DROP VALUE_P Sconst\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t * The following problems must be solved before this can be\n\t\t\t\t * implemented:\n\t\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t\t * - There must be no instance of the target value in\n\t\t\t\t *   any table.\n\t\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t\t * - The value must not appear in any catalog metadata,\n\t\t\t\t *   such as stored view expressions or column defaults.\n\t\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t\t * - The value must not appear in any non-leaf page of a\n\t\t\t\t *   btree (and similar issues with other index types).\n\t\t\t\t *   This is problematic because a value could persist\n\t\t\t\t *   there long after it's gone from user-visible data.\n\t\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t\t * - Concurrent sessions must not be able to insert the\n\t\t\t\t *   value while the preceding conditions are being checked.\n\t\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t\t * - Possibly more...\n\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"dropping an enum value is not implemented\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(@4)));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t ;\n\nopt_if_not_exists: IF_P NOT EXISTS              { $$ = true; }\n\t\t| /* EMPTY */                          { $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERIES :\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE OPERATOR CLASS ...\n *\t\t\t\tCREATE OPERATOR FAMILY ...\n *\t\t\t\tALTER OPERATOR FAMILY ...\n *\t\t\t\tDROP OPERATOR CLASS ...\n *\t\t\t\tDROP OPERATOR FAMILY ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCreateOpClassStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE OPERATOR CLASS any_name opt_default FOR TYPE_P Typename\n\t\t\tUSING name opt_opfamily AS opclass_item_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassStmt *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opclassname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isDefault = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->datatype = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->amname = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opfamilyname = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->items = $13;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopclass_item_list:\n\t\t\topclass_item\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| opclass_item_list ',' opclass_item\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nopclass_item:\n\t\t\tOPERATOR Iconst any_operator opclass_purpose\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\t\t\t\t\tObjectWithArgs *owa = makeNode(ObjectWithArgs);\n\n\t\t\t\t\towa->objname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\towa->objargs = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_OPERATOR;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = owa;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->number = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->order_family = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| OPERATOR Iconst operator_with_argtypes opclass_purpose\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_OPERATOR;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->number = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->order_family = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FUNCTION Iconst function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_FUNCTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->number = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FUNCTION Iconst '(' type_list ')' function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_FUNCTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->name = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->number = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->class_args = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| STORAGE Typename\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_STORAGETYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->storedtype = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_default:\tDEFAULT\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\nopt_opfamily:\tFAMILY any_name\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\nopclass_purpose: FOR SEARCH\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t\t| FOR ORDER BY any_name\t\t\t{ $$ = $4; }\n\t\t\t| /*EMPTY*/\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t;\n\n\nCreateOpFamilyStmt:\n\t\t\tCREATE OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpFamilyStmt *n = makeNode(CreateOpFamilyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opfamilyname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->amname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nAlterOpFamilyStmt:\n\t\t\tALTER OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name ADD_P opclass_item_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterOpFamilyStmt *n = makeNode(AlterOpFamilyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opfamilyname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->amname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isDrop = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->items = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALTER OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name DROP opclass_drop_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAlterOpFamilyStmt *n = makeNode(AlterOpFamilyStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->opfamilyname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->amname = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->isDrop = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->items = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopclass_drop_list:\n\t\t\topclass_drop\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| opclass_drop_list ',' opclass_drop\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nopclass_drop:\n\t\t\tOPERATOR Iconst '(' type_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_OPERATOR;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->number = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->class_args = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FUNCTION Iconst '(' type_list ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCreateOpClassItem *n = makeNode(CreateOpClassItem);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->itemtype = OPCLASS_ITEM_FUNCTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->number = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->class_args = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\nDropOpClassStmt:\n\t\t\tDROP OPERATOR CLASS any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($6), $4));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_OPCLASS;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP OPERATOR CLASS IF_P EXISTS any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($8), $6));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_OPCLASS;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nDropOpFamilyStmt:\n\t\t\tDROP OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($6), $4));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP OPERATOR FAMILY IF_P EXISTS any_name USING name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = list_make1(lcons(makeString($8), $6));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\n *\t\tDROP OWNED BY username [, username ...] [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]\n *\t\tREASSIGN OWNED BY username [, username ...] TO username\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\nDropOwnedStmt:\n\t\t\tDROP OWNED BY role_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropOwnedStmt *n = makeNode(DropOwnedStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nReassignOwnedStmt:\n\t\t\tREASSIGN OWNED BY role_list TO RoleSpec\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tReassignOwnedStmt *n = makeNode(ReassignOwnedStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->roles = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->newrole = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\n *\t\tDROP itemtype [ IF EXISTS ] itemname [, itemname ...]\n *           [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nDropStmt:\tDROP object_type_any_name IF_P EXISTS any_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP object_type_any_name any_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP drop_type_name IF_P EXISTS name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP drop_type_name name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP object_type_name_on_any_name name ON any_name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = list_make1(lappend($5, makeString($3)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP object_type_name_on_any_name IF_P EXISTS name ON any_name opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = list_make1(lappend($7, makeString($5)));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP TYPE_P type_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP TYPE_P IF_P EXISTS type_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP DOMAIN_P type_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_DOMAIN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP DOMAIN_P IF_P EXISTS type_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_DOMAIN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY any_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_INDEX;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF_P EXISTS any_name_list opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDropStmt *n = makeNode(DropStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->removeType = OBJECT_INDEX;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->missing_ok = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->concurrent = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n/* object types taking any_name/any_name_list */\nobject_type_any_name:\n\t\t\tTABLE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TABLE; }\n\t\t\t| SEQUENCE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_SEQUENCE; }\n\t\t\t| VIEW\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_VIEW; }\n\t\t\t| MATERIALIZED VIEW\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_MATVIEW; }\n\t\t\t| INDEX\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_INDEX; }\n\t\t\t| FOREIGN TABLE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_FOREIGN_TABLE; }\n\t\t\t| COLLATION\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_COLLATION; }\n\t\t\t| CONVERSION_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_CONVERSION; }\n\t\t\t| STATISTICS\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_STATISTIC_EXT; }\n\t\t\t| TEXT_P SEARCH PARSER\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TSPARSER; }\n\t\t\t| TEXT_P SEARCH DICTIONARY\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TSDICTIONARY; }\n\t\t\t| TEXT_P SEARCH TEMPLATE\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TSTEMPLATE; }\n\t\t\t| TEXT_P SEARCH CONFIGURATION\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TSCONFIGURATION; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*\n * object types taking name/name_list\n *\n * DROP handles some of them separately\n */\n\nobject_type_name:\n\t\t\tdrop_type_name\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| DATABASE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_DATABASE; }\n\t\t\t| ROLE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_ROLE; }\n\t\t\t| SUBSCRIPTION\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_SUBSCRIPTION; }\n\t\t\t| TABLESPACE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TABLESPACE; }\n\t\t;\n\ndrop_type_name:\n\t\t\tACCESS METHOD\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_ACCESS_METHOD; }\n\t\t\t| EVENT TRIGGER\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_EVENT_TRIGGER; }\n\t\t\t| EXTENSION\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_EXTENSION; }\n\t\t\t| FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_FDW; }\n\t\t\t| opt_procedural LANGUAGE\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_LANGUAGE; }\n\t\t\t| PUBLICATION\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_PUBLICATION; }\n\t\t\t| SCHEMA\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_SCHEMA; }\n\t\t\t| SERVER\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_FOREIGN_SERVER; }\n\t\t;\n\n/* object types attached to a table */\nobject_type_name_on_any_name:\n\t\t\tPOLICY\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_POLICY; }\n\t\t\t| RULE\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_RULE; }\n\t\t\t| TRIGGER\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = OBJECT_TRIGGER; }\n\t\t;\n\nany_name_list:\n\t\t\tany_name\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| any_name_list ',' any_name\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nany_name:\tColId\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }\n\t\t\t| ColId attrs\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lcons(makeString($1), $2); }\n\t\t;\n\nattrs:\t\t'.' attr_name\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1(makeString($2)); }\n\t\t\t| attrs '.' attr_name\n\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }\n\t\t;\n\ntype_name_list:\n\t\t\tTypename\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| type_name_list ',' Typename\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\t\ttruncate table relname1, relname2, ...\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nTruncateStmt:\n\t\t\tTRUNCATE opt_table relation_expr_list opt_restart_seqs opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tTruncateStmt *n = makeNode(TruncateStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->relations = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->restart_seqs = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_restart_seqs:\n\t\t\tCONTINUE_P IDENTITY_P\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t\t| RESTART IDENTITY_P\t\t{ $$ = true; }\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t{ $$ = false; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * COMMENT ON <object> IS <text>\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nCommentStmt:\n\t\t\tCOMMENT ON object_type_any_name any_name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON COLUMN any_name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_COLUMN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON object_type_name name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) makeString($4);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON TYPE_P Typename IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON DOMAIN_P Typename IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON FUNCTION function_with_argtypes IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON OPERATOR operator_with_argtypes IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_OPERATOR;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON CONSTRAINT name ON any_name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TABCONSTRAINT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON CONSTRAINT name ON DOMAIN_P any_name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_DOMCONSTRAINT;\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * should use Typename not any_name in the production, but\n\t\t\t\t\t * there's a shift/reduce conflict if we do that, so fix it\n\t\t\t\t\t * up here.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) list_make2(makeTypeNameFromNameList($7), makeString($4));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON object_type_name_on_any_name name ON any_name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON ROUTINE function_with_argtypes IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON TRANSFORM FOR Typename LANGUAGE name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TRANSFORM;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) list_make2($5, makeString($7));\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON OPERATOR CLASS any_name USING name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_OPCLASS;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($7), $5);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON OPERATOR FAMILY any_name USING name IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_OPFAMILY;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) lcons(makeString($7), $5);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON LARGE_P OBJECT_P NumericOnly IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| COMMENT ON CAST '(' Typename AS Typename ')' IS comment_text\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tCommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_CAST;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) list_make2($5, $7);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->comment = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\ncomment_text:\n\t\t\tSconst\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| NULL_P\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *  SECURITY LABEL [FOR <provider>] ON <object> IS <label>\n *\n *  As with COMMENT ON, <object> can refer to various types of database\n *  objects (e.g. TABLE, COLUMN, etc.).\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nSecLabelStmt:\n\t\t\tSECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON object_type_any_name any_name\n\t\t\tIS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON COLUMN any_name\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_COLUMN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON object_type_name name\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) makeString($6);\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON TYPE_P Typename\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON DOMAIN_P Typename\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON FUNCTION function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON LARGE_P OBJECT_P NumericOnly\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_PROCEDURE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON ROUTINE function_with_argtypes\n\t\t\t  IS security_label\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tSecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->provider = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->object = (Node *) $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->label = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nopt_provider:\tFOR NonReservedWord_or_Sconst\t{ $$ = $2; }\n\t\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\nsecurity_label:\tSconst\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t\t| NULL_P\t\t\t{ $$ = NULL; }\n\t\t;\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n *\t\tQUERY:\n *\t\t\tfetch/move\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nFetchStmt:\tFETCH fetch_args\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = (FetchStmt *) $2;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ismove = false;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| MOVE fetch_args\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = (FetchStmt *) $2;\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->ismove = true;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nfetch_args:\tcursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| NEXT opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| PRIOR opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_BACKWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FIRST_P opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_ABSOLUTE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| LAST_P opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_ABSOLUTE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = -1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ABSOLUTE_P SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_ABSOLUTE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| RELATIVE_P SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_RELATIVE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = $1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALL opt_from_in *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORWARD opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORWARD SignedIconst opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FORWARD ALL opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = FETCH_FORWARD;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->howMany = FETCH_ALL;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| BACKWARD opt_from_in cursor_name\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFetchStmt *n = makeNode(FetchStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->portalname = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->direction = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nfrom_in:\tFROM\n\t\t\t| IN_P\n\t\t;\n\nopt_from_in:\tfrom_in\n\t\t\t| /* EMPTY */\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*****************************************************************************\n *\n * GRANT and REVOKE statements\n *\n *****************************************************************************/\n\nGrantStmt:\tGRANT privileges ON privilege_target TO grantee_list\n\t\t\topt_grant_grant_option opt_granted_by\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tGrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_grant = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->privileges = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->targtype = ($4)->targtype;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = ($4)->objtype;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = ($4)->objs;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grantees = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grant_option = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grantor = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nRevokeStmt:\n\t\t\tREVOKE privileges ON privilege_target\n\t\t\tFROM grantee_list opt_granted_by opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tGrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_grant = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grant_option = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->privileges = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->targtype = ($4)->targtype;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = ($4)->objtype;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = ($4)->objs;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grantees = $6;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grantor = $7;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $8;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| REVOKE GRANT OPTION FOR privileges ON privilege_target\n\t\t\tFROM grantee_list opt_granted_by opt_drop_behavior\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tGrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->is_grant = false;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grant_option = true;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->privileges = $5;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->targtype = ($7)->targtype;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = ($7)->objtype;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objects = ($7)->objs;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grantees = $9;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->grantor = $10;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->behavior = $11;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = (Node *) n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/*\n * Privilege names are represented as strings; the validity of the privilege\n * names gets checked at execution.  This is a bit annoying but we have little\n * choice because of the syntactic conflict with lists of role names in\n * GRANT/REVOKE.  What's more, we have to call out in the \"privilege\"\n * production any reserved keywords that need to be usable as privilege names.\n */\n\n/* either ALL [PRIVILEGES] or a list of individual privileges */\nprivileges: privilege_list\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = $1; }\n\t\t\t| ALL\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t\t| ALL PRIVILEGES\n\t\t\t\t{ $$ = NIL; }\n\t\t\t| ALL '(' columnList ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cols = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1(n);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| ALL PRIVILEGES '(' columnList ')'\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->cols = $4;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1(n);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nprivilege_list:\tprivilege\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{ $$ = list_make1($1); }\n\t\t\t| privilege_list ',' privilege\t\t\t{ $$ = lappend($1, $3); }\n\t\t;\n\nprivilege:\tSELECT opt_column_list\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = pstrdup($1);\n\t\t\t\tn->cols = $2;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| REFERENCES opt_column_list\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = pstrdup($1);\n\t\t\t\tn->cols = $2;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| CREATE opt_column_list\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = pstrdup($1);\n\t\t\t\tn->cols = $2;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| ALTER SYSTEM_P\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = pstrdup(\"alter system\");\n\t\t\t\tn->cols = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| ColId opt_column_list\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tAccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);\n\n\t\t\t\tn->priv_name = $1;\n\t\t\t\tn->cols = $2;\n\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nparameter_name_list:\n\t\tparameter_name\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = list_make1(makeString($1));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| parameter_name_list ',' parameter_name\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = lappend($1, makeString($3));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\nparameter_name:\n\t\tColId\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = $1;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t| parameter_name '.' ColId\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t$$ = psprintf(\"%s.%s\", $1, $3);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t;\n\n\n/* Don't bother trying to fold the first two rules into one using\n * opt_table.  You're going to get conflicts.\n */\nprivilege_target:\n\t\t\tqualified_name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->targtype = palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objs = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| SEQUENCE OBJECT_SEQUENCE;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objs = $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) $2;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| DOMAIN_P any_name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));\n\n\t\t\t\t\tn->targtype = OBJECT_LARGEOBJECT;\n\t\t\t\t\tn->objs = $3;\n\t\t\t\t\t$$ = n;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t| PARAMETER parameter_name_list\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tPrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *)
